scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const lock of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.unlinkSync(lock); } catch {} } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
